programme.title: E9 - Layout Dysfunction
programme.desc: A couple doesn't want to leave their home close to downtown and the greenbelt, but the space is totally dysfunctional for their family of four.

programme.title: E1 - Sunday Pot Roast
programme.desc: Joanna prepares her family's Sunday night dinner featuring pot roast, a braided bread, romaine salad with buttermilk ranch dressing and warm apple pie.

programme.title: E2 - Afterschool Snacks
programme.desc: Joanna whips up her Granddad's Syrian doughnut recipe. Then, she completes her after-school snack line up with chewy granola bars and warm banana bread.

programme.title: E7 - Garfield
programme.desc: Four professional cake artists compete to create a fantastic cake, celebrating a lasagne-loving cartoon cat. Who will win the big cash prize?

programme.title: E8 - Once Twice Three Times A Keloid
programme.desc: Robert has a small keloid on his ear and a large, snakelike keloid on the back of his head that has been removed and returned three times.

E6 - Shark Dentist
programme.desc: Marvel at the toothy fish that help sharks maintain their pearly whites and discover the signature calls of dolphin families. Examine capuchin monkey’s nut-cracking stone tools, get the warm fuzzies when giraffes snuggle, and meet a meerkat mobster.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Join anthropologist Jill Pruetz and guide Dondo (Johnny) Kanté and watch evolution happen in real time. Meet the elusive chimps of Fongoli, Senegal, who use tools, interact with fire, and adapt to the human world as it collides with their own.

programme.title: E1 - Earth
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of the Earth, where a drama is unfolding in real time. Meet animals, from tiny butterflies to huge humpback whales, that are acting as sentinels, adapting their behaviour, and helping us unlock the riddles of our changing planet.

programme.title: E3 - A New Zealand Christmas
programme.desc: See how one animal family’s tragedy is another’s holiday dinner as New Zealand’s mainland and island creatures, including penguins, flightless birds, sea lions, and sharks, battle to feed and protect their young in this marine environment.

programme.title: E3 - The Misfit Comes of Age
programme.desc: If the tiny Nsefu pride is to survive, the teen Misfit and his older brother must quickly perfect their hunting skills. Trek into enemy territory as the lions face dominant rivals and a powerful hyena clan in the search for prey.

programme.title: E4 - The Leopard Who Changed Her Spots
programme.desc: Meet pampered young leopardess Chipadzua, who has never had to hunt for food, thanks to her patient mother. Alone for the first time in her life, will she develop the skills it takes to survive?

programme.desc: Travel to the ends of the Earth, where a drama is unfolding in real time. Meet animals, from tiny butterflies to huge humpback whales, that are acting as sentinels, adapting their behaviour, and helping us unlock the riddles of our changing planet.

programme.title: E6 - Shark Dentist
programme.desc: Marvel at the toothy fish that help sharks maintain their pearly whites and discover the signature calls of dolphin families. Examine capuchin monkey’s nut-cracking stone tools, get the warm fuzzies when giraffes snuggle, and meet a meerkat mobster.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Join anthropologist Jill Pruetz and guide Dondo (Johnny) Kanté and watch evolution happen in real time. Meet the elusive chimps of Fongoli, Senegal, who use tools, interact with fire, and adapt to the human world as it collides with their own.

programme.title: E1 - Earth
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of the Earth, where a drama is unfolding in real time. Meet animals, from tiny butterflies to huge humpback whales, that are acting as sentinels, adapting their behaviour, and helping us unlock the riddles of our changing planet.

programme.title: Coolie
programme.desc: An honest worker rises against injustice when powerful enemies exploit the poor. With courage and determination, he leads a fiery fight for dignity, justice and survival. Release Year: 1983 Director: Manmohan Desai, Prayag Raj

programme.title: A Flying Jatt
programme.desc: Aman a meek youngster who is scared of heights, discovers his superpowers when he is forced to face the evil Raka, who is sent by an industrialist to destroy humanity. Release Year: 2016 Director: Remo D'Souza Awards: 2017 Nominee Reader's Choice- Best Choreographer- Rahul ShettyPaul Cardoz

programme.title: E12 - Vietnam Pow Escape
programme.desc: A German-American pilot, Dieter Dengler, uses survival skills honed as a child to escape a secret prison in Laos in the early years of the Vietnam war.

programme.title: E318 - Picking Nirvana
programme.desc: In Ohio, a late friend's picking nirvana has the Wolfe brothers howling. With a successful demolition business and an eye for treasure, Brian amassed a mind-boggling collection of rare, oversize gems.

programme.title: Venezuela's Car Crisis: Why Do Used Cars Cost As Much As New Ones?
programme.desc: In Venezuela, years of halted imports, sky-high tariffs, and economic collapse have left drivers stuck between aging Toyotas and pricey Chinese SUVs in a distorted market. Plus: REV puts the new Mazda 6e to the test.

programme.title: Economic Powerhouse China - A Risky Partner?
programme.desc: China is pushing into European markets - and striving for ever greater military power. This has already had an impact on the internal and external security of Western countries. How dependent is Germany on China?

programme.title: Facial Recognition: Helpful Or Controlling?
programme.desc: Facial recognition is now part of daily life - unlocking phones, verifying identities, and helping law enforcement. But in government hands, it can become a serious threat to privacy and civil liberties.

programme.title: My Holy Car - An Obsession Made In Germany - Part 1
programme.desc: More than 140 years after its invention, the car remains a source of fascination for many people. In Germany, for example, there are more vehicles on the road than ever before. For some, the car is a cult object. But it also deeply polarizing.

programme.title: Economic Powerhouse China - A Risky Partner?
programme.desc: China is pushing into European markets - and striving for ever greater military power. This has already had an impact on the internal and external security of Western countries. How dependent is Germany on China?

programme.title: My Holy Car - An Obsession Made In Germany - Part 1
programme.desc: More than 140 years after its invention, the car remains a source of fascination for many people. In Germany, for example, there are more vehicles on the road than ever before. For some, the car is a cult object. But it also deeply polarizing.

programme.title: The Business Case For Space And Why Small Modular Reactors Could Change Eve
programme.desc: The world spent E106 billion on space in 2023 - more than the GDP of most countries. Critics call it a vanity project. Supporters point to trillion-dollar spinoffs like GPS and satellite navigation that quietly power everything from Uber to global banking. So, who's right? We dig into the numbers and challenge the hype around lunar mining.

programme.title: The Haydn Expedition, Part 2
programme.desc: Is Joseph Haydn's music boring? Not at all, say Paavo Jaervi and the musicians of the Deutsche Kammerphilharmonie Bremen. On their musical journey through Haydn's symphonic works, they discover new and surprising things.

programme.title: E2 - Tom Arnold
programme.desc: World-renowned survivalist Bear Grylls takes Tom Arnold (Sons of Anarchy (2008)) through the unpredictable coastal mountains of Oregon, taking on steep terrain, river crossings and oceanside cliffs. Arnold attempts to channel the courage and determination from his weight-loss struggle in order to tackle a journey that takes him to the brink of mental and physical exhaustion.

programme.title: E2 - 102
programme.desc: Today on Million Dollar House Hunt we meet our house hunters Ella and Sa who are searching for a million dollar property in the bay side of Melbourne

programme.title: E2 - An Airplane's 2nd Life
programme.desc: A passenger aircraft is stripped down. But the aircraft is not decommissioned - it is given a special conversion and begins a second life as a cargo jet. In just a few months, 600 men and women transform a passenger jet into a long-haul cargo plane - a masterpiece of aeronautical engineering! During the conversion, they give the old aircraft up to 30 percent more storage space and reduce fuel consumption per tonne of payload by 20 percent. Various parts have to be converted or removed and replaced - there is a lot to do.

programme.title: E3 - Leave No Man Behind
programme.desc: Bear drops the contestants off in the middle of a bay where they must swim to shore and, in their haste, a team is left behind. Once on the shore, they must navigate waterfalls, where an injury takes the group by storm.

programme.title: E3 - Girona
programme.desc: Jack learns how to cook the old-fashioned, classic British jellied eels dish. Although it was once an extremely popular meal in Britain, will the Spanish locals like it too?

programme.title: E1 - The Big Deal
programme.desc: Claudia’s season starts off with a bang when she receives a $250,000 jade order, but things quickly turn sour when her crew questions if they have a big enough boulder to complete the sale.

programme.title: E2 - The Last Laugh
programme.desc: After years of getting the raw end of the deal with Scrappy Larry, Robin pulls a prank on his old buddy, but the fun and games end when Claudia’s buyer makes an unexpected request.

programme.title: E3 - Down to the Wire
programme.desc: Under pressure to meet their buyer’s tight deadline, Robin and Josh clash when they run into endless problems setting up the wire saw.

programme.title: E4 - Trans Mission
programme.desc: When a major breakdown threatens to shut down the mine, Claudia and Robin make a risky decision to get desperately needed fuel into camp.

programme.title: E2 - Highlights 2
programme.desc: Tensions run high as the celebrities navigate their way through dense jungle down a ravine, and when they eventually reach what will be their camp for the night, a meal of live scorpions is on the menu. The following morning, they bathe in the nearby river - their first wash in three days - but the relief is only short-lived when Bear arrives for the team's first big test - a descent of a 120ft waterfall. At the end of an action-packed day, one more member of the group faces elimination.

programme.title: E6 - Hurricane Lester
programme.desc: A Houston area school teacher, who lost almost everything in Hurricane Harvey, sets out with Bear Grylls to face a different side of Mother Nature. Along the way, Lester is put to the test, but proves that no challenge is too tough for his unbreakable spirit.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: Renee catches a croc three times her size but Ryan is struggling. John takes Renee and Ryan on an overnight trip where they must share a motel room with crocodiles and the chance to go to Kakadu is on everyone’s mind.

programme.title: E2 - Northern Territory
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah’s Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paperbark Leaf BBQ Barramundi with Sour Tamarind Sauce at Anbangbang Billabong, showcasing the region's environment and produce.

programme.title: E22 - The Pool
programme.desc: Packing for the pool, Bluey and Dad tease Mum about being so fussy with what to take. But when they arrive underprepared, they realise a little planning goes a long way.

programme.title: E12 - Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: E12 - White Cliffs Of Dover, England
programme.desc: The Go Jetters race to save the White Cliffs of Dover when Glitch digs for classroom chalk

programme.title: E4 - River Chub
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to North America in search of a river chub that builds an underwater nest with over 7000 pebbles.

programme.title: E39 - Exercise
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: E12 - Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: E4 - Omelette
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: E5 - Born Yesterday
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: E6 - Peas
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have fun looking for peas with the Playtimers in their Pea Party game.

programme.title: E13 - The Dancing Bug Badge
programme.desc: When a dancing bug lands on Duggee's head, he can't stop dancing. The Squirrels see that it's a tiny hillbilly bug with a fiddle. And what's more, he's got a band with him - the Hillbilly Bug Band.

programme.title: E23 - Go Jet Academy: Hurricane Rescue
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch tries to rescue a Grimbot from an Atlantic hurricane. The Go Jetters have to rescue him!

programme.title: E22 - Go Jet Academy: Biogas Power
programme.desc: Greener fuel spells trouble for Glitch.

programme.title: E25 - Delivery
programme.desc: Stanley helps Hattie, Fred, and Fifi with a new food delivery service. It starts well, except with each delivery a problem arises. Stanley must solve them before Myrtle's party.

programme.title: E9 - I Don't Like Bananas
programme.desc: From broccoli soup to cheeseburgers and blue cheese, the funny animals chat about the best and worst things to eat.

programme.title: E43 - It's Time For Lunar New Year
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran meet Henry and Bonnie, who are celebrating Lunar New Year. They join them inside the art gallery to find out about Chinese traditions.

programme.title: E34 - Space
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: E36 - Dirt
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: E40 - The Wedding Badge
programme.desc: King Tiger has met his perfect partner and he is getting married. It's going to be a royal wedding!! The squirrels are to be special Guests of Honour, but who is King Tiger marrying!?

programme.title: E5 - I'm Hungry
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: E3 - Cabbage
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the marvellous Cabbage.

programme.title: Secrets and Spies
programme.desc: Doki can't stand when he doesn't know something. So when Gabi becomes extra secretive about her diary, he's determined to find out why. The Team learns about spy techniques and ways to uncover secrets that others don't want you to know!

programme.title: Silverware
programme.desc: Re-using the silverware to make something so awesome that it has left us in awe!

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: Clothespin
programme.desc: What can Hepi and Briko make with clothespins? Let's find out!

programme.title: Rocket to the moon
programme.desc: A game of tag turns into a magical rocketship ride to the moon, where an asteroid storm threatens to destroy Oto and Mai!

programme.title: The River
programme.desc: The pursuit of the cunning salmon turns into a voyage from the ocean through the river to the spring.

programme.title: Trip to Korea
programme.desc: Zoe and Alim are surprised to see Milo holding his breath. Did he eat something spicy? No, he's just trying to beat his apnea record. When Zoe wants to try, Milo claims boys are better. Alim takes them to South Korea, where women dive for pearls, and men stay home!

programme.title: Courtly Love
programme.desc: Dove is going through a rocky time with her horrible husband, Lord Roach. She consequently falls for Sir Howler. Despite being humble and loyal, Howler isn't always a paragon of finesse when it comes to winning the lady's heart or dealing with the jealous spouse!

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: Pittsburgh
programme.desc: Pittsburgh exploration: Andy Warhol Museum, thrilling cave rappel outside the city, city hotspots with local teens, and metal bracelet crafting with a local artist. A diverse week of art, adventure, and creativity with Nicole in western Pennsylvania!

programme.title: The River
programme.desc: The pursuit of the cunning salmon turns into a voyage from the ocean through the river to the spring.

programme.title: Eric's Bear Paws
programme.desc: Eric learns that many animals have developed an insulating coat of fat to keep them warm and dry. He uses this idea to create a way to put his hand in very cold water without getting hurt.

programme.title: Dance Baby Dance
programme.desc: Frank buys a dancing machine for the cafe, but only Jessi enjoys it. Robbie mocks it-until he learns girls like guys who can dance. With Jessi's help, he gives it a try and discovers something unexpected: he doesn't just like dancing... he loves it.

programme.title: Spy Vision!
programme.desc: Eric wants to be a secret agent. He makes a periscope so he can watch the world without being seen. He discovers that the same principle is used by submarines and even by dentists.

programme.title: Go Fly a Kite
programme.desc: Have you ever noticed that a kite in geometry looks a lot like a kite in the sky? It's no coincidence. In this episode we join Eric on a high-flying mission to unfurl the secret of symmetry used to make kites fly. Is it magic ... or is it math?!

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: Trip to Korea
programme.desc: Zoe and Alim are surprised to see Milo holding his breath. Did he eat something spicy? No, he's just trying to beat his apnea record. When Zoe wants to try, Milo claims boys are better. Alim takes them to South Korea, where women dive for pearls, and men stay home!

programme.title: Superchutes!
programme.desc: Eric makes a parachute that will slow down a falling egg just enough so it doesn't get smashed when it hits the ground. But first he experiments to figure out the best parachute size. He discovers that NASA also use parachutes to drop robotic probes on to the moon.

programme.title: Clothespin
programme.desc: What can Hepi and Briko make with clothespins? Let's find out!

programme.title: Groundwater
programme.desc: The birthday surprise traps Kit and Mr. Battery in a cave.

programme.title: Bouncing and Bending Light
programme.desc: What is the difference between reflection and refraction? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of light. Have hands-on fun by mixing oil and water, and get to know Zhang Heng, a great polymath, who figured out the Moon reflects light like a mirror.

programme.title: Cats the Musical
programme.desc: The Buffycats are organizing the annual Cat Party. Thanks to a pawesome Buffy-Brainstorm, they set up a musical with all the 44 cats! Everyone joins the show... Boss, Blister and Scab included, thanks to their talent for mischief!

programme.title: Family Life in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Meet a peasant family in their daily lives, back in the Middle Ages. Dove and Howler are very busy parents! Besides educating their little urchin kids, welcoming a new baby, dealing with daily home life, life for these peasant parents is eventful to say the least!

programme.title: Groundwater
programme.desc: The birthday surprise traps Kit and Mr. Battery in a cave.

programme.title: Kiwifruit Valley Rescue Team
programme.desc: When one of their friends gets hurt, Darwin and Newts form the Kiwifruit Valley Rescue Team to help in an emergency.

programme.title: Eric's Bear Paws
programme.desc: Eric learns that many animals have developed an insulating coat of fat to keep them warm and dry. He uses this idea to create a way to put his hand in very cold water without getting hurt.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... A Lighthouse
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly Lighthouse. Lighthouse needs to light the way for a small boat as it heads towards the shore but his bulb has gone.

programme.title: Eric's Bear Paws
programme.desc: Eric learns that many animals have developed an insulating coat of fat to keep them warm and dry. He uses this idea to create a way to put his hand in very cold water without getting hurt.

programme.title: Wind Beneath Your Wings
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make the perfect paper plane using symmetry. He finds out that real planes use the same principle as paper planes – when the fins point up and air hits them at high speed, the front of the plane is pushed up and the plane rises.

programme.title: Disappearing Ducks
programme.desc: When Heni organises her charity duckling river race, Darwin and Newts discover an underwater stream.

programme.title: Kiwifruit Valley Rescue Team
programme.desc: When one of their friends gets hurt, Darwin and Newts form the Kiwifruit Valley Rescue Team to help in an emergency.

programme.desc: Meet a peasant family in their daily lives, back in the Middle Ages. Dove and Howler are very busy parents! Besides educating their little urchin kids, welcoming a new baby, dealing with daily home life, life for these peasant parents is eventful to say the least!

programme.title: Superchutes!
programme.desc: Eric makes a parachute that will slow down a falling egg just enough so it doesn't get smashed when it hits the ground. But first he experiments to figure out the best parachute size. He discovers that NASA also use parachutes to drop robotic probes on to the moon.

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: Pittsburgh
programme.desc: Pittsburgh adventure: Battled rapids on a white water adventure, savored Primanti Brothers' iconic taste, hands-on bird experience at National Aviary, and glided across the sky with the Pittsburgh soaring club. A week of diverse thrills in Pennsylvania!

programme.title: Superchutes!
programme.desc: Eric makes a parachute that will slow down a falling egg just enough so it doesn't get smashed when it hits the ground. But first he experiments to figure out the best parachute size. He discovers that NASA also use parachutes to drop robotic probes on to the moon.

programme.title: Go Fly a Kite
programme.desc: Have you ever noticed that a kite in geometry looks a lot like a kite in the sky? It's no coincidence. In this episode we join Eric on a high-flying mission to unfurl the secret of symmetry used to make kites fly. Is it magic ... or is it math?!

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: Eric's Bear Paws
programme.desc: Eric learns that many animals have developed an insulating coat of fat to keep them warm and dry. He uses this idea to create a way to put his hand in very cold water without getting hurt.

programme.title: Courtly Love
programme.desc: Dove is going through a rocky time with her horrible husband, Lord Roach. She consequently falls for Sir Howler. Despite being humble and loyal, Howler isn't always a paragon of finesse when it comes to winning the lady's heart or dealing with the jealous spouse!

programme.title: Vertigo
programme.desc: A retired detective is hired to investigate a friend's wife, only to become too close to his mark.

programme.title: My Small Land
programme.desc: The daughter of a Kurdish refugee is caught between her roots and her loyalty to her new homeland.

programme.title: Flee
programme.desc: FLEE tells the extraordinary true story of a man, Amin, on the verge of marriage which compels him to reveal his hidden past for the first time

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Project X: The Challengers-New Beginnings 'The Grounding Of Kaiwomaru'
programme.desc: Project X returns for the first time in 18 years. The former series featured people involved in project related to the Japanese industry and contemporary history. The new series focuses on people in the “Lost Era” following the collapse of the bubble economy. In every era, there are always those take on challenges. Even without receiving praise or being in the spotlight, some dedicate themselves to their work. The documentary delivers passion and courage right to you.

programme.title: E5 - Baby John's Guide to Being Safe!
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns all about being safe! First, he learns how important it is to always put on his seatbelt when he goes for a ride. Then, Mom & Dad teach the kids what to do if an accident happens & how to avoid them. The safety lessons continue as Baby John learns how to be safe while playing at the playground, at the beach & even while swimming in the pool. It's always important to be safe!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Imagination Adventure!
programme.desc: Join JJ & his animal friends on a big imagination adventure! First, Wally teaches everyone how to sail like real pirates, but they'll need to work together to stay on course! Then, when Mimi gets hungry, she decides the moon must be made of cheese, so the friends build a rocketship to fly there & find out! The adventure continues as they follow a treasure map to find special shape keys & help Little Red Riding JJ avoid Wally Wolf's silly traps in the woods.

programme.title: E3 - A Sick Trick, A Spider, A Bump & A Fly!
programme.desc: The Minibods are dealing with a sick trick, a spider, a bump & a fly! First, Jeff is sick, but after he recovers, he misses the attention & pretends he's still unwell! Then, Fuse is woken up by spooky noises in the night & must put on a brave face for Lulu to investigate. His bravery is tested again when he finds a spider in his gym & doesn't know how to get it out. The chaos ends when Pogo can't sleep & has to deal with a very noisy fly!

programme.title: E4 - Using Your Brains to Save the Day!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he uses his brains to save the day! When he overloads the carwash with bubble mix, he gets trapped in a giant bubble & floats away! He has to use all his smarts to find a way back down. Then, when Amber the Ambulance crashes & can't move, there's a big emergency! Buster has to muster up his courage & become a 'Hero Ambulance Bus' to save his best friend Scout from a broken bridge.

programme.title: E2 - JJ Sings & Dances to Classic Rhymes!
programme.desc: It's a dance party featuring all your favorite classic rhymes! Join JJ, Bella & Cece as they dance to 'Hey Diddle Diddle' while the cow jumps over the moon. The fun continues as they help their friend Humpty Dumpty get home after a great fall with the help of some sea creature friends! Then, get ready to rock out with a band of monkeys in a brand-new version of 'Rockabye Baby.' From 'Five Little Speckled Frogs' to 'Looby Loo,' it's a dance party full of classic fun!

programme.title: E9 - JJ's Favorite Songs & Stories!
programme.desc: It's story time with JJ's favorite songs & stories! First, sing along to 'Wheels on the Bus' as JJ & his friends put on an interactive show. Then, settle in for some classic tales. Watch as the three little pigs try to build houses strong enough to keep the Big Bad Wolf away. Then, find out who wins a big race: the speedy hare or the slow & steady tortoise! Finally, learn a lesson about working hard with the story of the Grasshopper & the Ants.

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & goodnight songs! First, Mia giggles with delight as she gathers four of her favorite stuffed animals into bed with her for a fun game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The bedtime fun continues as Maple & Muffin play a game of 'Five Little Monkeys' during their bubble bath. Then, Grandma Panda helps Mia & Bari embark on a fantastic adventure, building a little rocket out of cushions to go on an adventure to the moon!

programme.title: E1 - A Day with Nina's Family
programme.desc: Spend a fun-filled day with Nina & her amazing family! First, Nina & her siblings learn all about how things fly as they dream of soaring through the sky like their dad, who is a pilot! Then, it's time for a yummy adventure in the kitchen as Nina & her Abuelita (grandma) decide to make a traditional Mexican breakfast for everyone. The family fun continues as they go on a scavenger hunt for colorful flowers & work together to help the magical Star Star get back into the sky!

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: E1 - Baby John's Big Day Out Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Baby John on some big day out adventures! First, the family visits the zoo to see all the amazing animals, like elephants, monkeys & hippos! Then, it's Baby John's first time at the water park, where he has lots of fun with water squirters & wading pools. The adventure continues with a trip to a fun theme park, where the family enjoys the merry-go-round, bumper cars & yummy cotton candy!

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate showdown between Arpo & his arch-nemesis, the Squirrel! The trouble multiplies when the squirrel uses a ray gun to create an army of clones that fills the house. Then, the battle for food continues as the squirrel tries to steal a freshly baked apple pie & tasty food from a picnic BBQ. The showdown gets truly bizarre when the squirrel gets trapped inside Arpo & takes control of the robot's body, causing all sorts of confusing chaos for the family!

programme.title: E1 - Epic Rescues with Grandma Gecko!
programme.desc: Grandma Gecko is here to help with some epic rescues! The action starts when Weasel's accelerator gets stuck & he can't stop driving! Grandma Gecko & Gecko hop on a motorbike for a high-speed chase to save him. Then, when lots of vehicles get flat tires from nails on the road, Gecko feels the pressure & calls his Grandma to help him speedily change all the tires. From building a wind turbine to saving Blue, Grandma can do it all!

programme.title: E9 - JJ's Favorite Songs & Stories!
programme.desc: It's story time with JJ's favorite songs & stories! First, sing along to 'Wheels on the Bus' as JJ & his friends put on an interactive show. Then, settle in for some classic tales. Watch as the three little pigs try to build houses strong enough to keep the Big Bad Wolf away. Then, find out who wins a big race: the speedy hare or the slow & steady tortoise! Finally, learn a lesson about working hard with the story of the Grasshopper & the Ants.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: All The Long Nights
programme.desc: After a series of mishaps at work caused by her severe pre-menstrual syndrome, Fujisawa lands a new job at an astronomical toy factory, where she meets Yamazoe, a tacit colleague plagued by panic attacks. There the two, whose careers have been derailed by their respective conditions, learn to support and care for each other through life's ups and downs despite their initial friction.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E146 -Love You Forever
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Love You Forever
programme.desc: Some lives are linked across time, connected by destiny. While aiding an old theatre attendant Lin Ge (Lee Hongchi), aspiring dancer Qiu Qian (Li Yitong) stumbles upon his diary which chronicles the life and memories they shared together since childhood, thus discovering a timeless love story concealed in another dimension.

programme.title: My Small Land
programme.desc: For Sarya (17), a Kurdish refugee girl in Japan, life seems to be looking up; her grades at school are enough to pursue college, she's surrounded with good friends and her relationship with Sota is becoming special. Sarya's life becomes upside down, however, when she learns that her family's refugee status is turned down, restricting her family from work and traveling across the city. Her father, who had continued to work to sustain a living, is taken into custody for illegal employment. Sarya is now suddenly forced into a situation where she is responsible not only for her younger siblings but for her very existence.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E252 -She’s Got No Name
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Legendary Award Winners: The Dead And The Deadly
programme.desc: Fatboy is a helper to Grand Uncle who is the town's high priest. They are now found in the ancestral shrine of the Mas working wonders. Fatboy is also being reprimanded by Grand Uncle for being rude to his fiancee, Yuen. The last of the Mas, the rich family in town, is back but Ma Lucho is coming home dead. Accompanying the body is a woman who claims to be Ma's wife and very much pregnant. But Fatboy knows his boyhood friend Ma couldn't be a husband because he was impotent...

programme.title: Beyond's Diary
programme.desc: This is the story of four aspiring young men striving to fight for their own goals. However just as their goal is about in sight, over-exertion causes Kui to fall ill...Keung is a smart and aggressive young man whose ambition is to make it in the world. programme.title: E2 - Summer As The Water Flows
programme.desc: Switzerland is a veritable land of lakes. Whether Lake Lucerne, Lake Sils or Lake Walen, their waters are always refreshing in summer and offer a much-appreciated habitat for man as much as for the plants and animals.

programme.title: E2 - 球團長城感人合唱
programme.desc: 由劉宇寧、龔俊、孫紅雷、李乃文、陳赫、陳星旭、王玉雯、歐陽娣娣組成爆笑「地球團」，沿著地球脈絡從中國出發，感受北緯40度的煙火氣，通過遊戲任務解鎖各地文化與美食，用新鮮有趣的方式，探索全世界的同頻快樂。

programme.title: E10 - 講述揚州大運河歷史
programme.desc: 世界遺產探訪紀實文化類節目，由單霽翔、周韻、肖央、牛駿峰擔任「世遺守護人」，通過與當地的人文學者、申遺專家等進行交流，揭秘中國世界遺產背後的故事，呈現中國世界文化遺產的新奇觀、新地標、新景象、新人文。

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ''living in the future'!

programme.title: E320
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: E320
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: E523
programme.desc: Foreigners who have left their familiar worlds behind and come to the unfamiliar land of Korea! A vivid, real-life adaptation story of foreigners trying to settle into Korean society for various reasons. This reality program warmly portrays their concerns about jobs, marriage, and parenting while living in Korea.

programme.title: E27
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary college girl finds herself reincarnated as a background extra in a romance novel, only to spend a night with the story's most dangerously obsessive male lead. A romantic fantasy with no brakes begins!

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 'The King of Tears, Lee Bangwon' dealing with the defeat of Goryeo, the founding of Joseon
